subject: [PATCH v5 15/21] nfsd: send basic file attributes in CB_NOTIFY

2026-05-22.patch_summary: This patch adds the ability to send basic file attributes in CB_NOTIFY events, including inode information that can be acquired via GETATTR. The attributes sent include type, change time, size, file ID, mode, number of links, raw device, space used, access time, metadata time, and modify time. This allows clients to receive updated attribute information without needing to issue a separate CB_GETATTR request.
